headline: Microchip Technology Says Inventory Slump Is Nearing End as Data Center Wins Build
summary: Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP) executives said the company is nearing the end of a prolonged inventory correction while positioning for growth tied to data centers, aerospace and defense, automotive systems and industrial markets.
